name: Steamed Red Snapper
recipeIngredient: approximately 1/2 cup tomato sauce or ketchup
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the fish and drain on paper towel.
2. In a large skillet, sauté onion in butter until just translucent.
3. Lay the fish fillets on top of onion rings.
4. Top each fillet with tomato sauce.
5. Sprinkle sweet basil and black pepper to taste.
6. Cover and simmer for 10 to 15 minutes, until the fish flakes.
7. Serve with steamed new potatoes and vegetables. Serves 4.
